emails.subject: Talisman ETA
emails.body: Tana: Please prepare an execution copy of the Talisman ETA in the form attached below. Dave has approved this letter agreement. Please notify Lisa Lees when you send out the final execution copy to Talisman for signature. (She is Talisman's EOL marketing rep.) Thanks, Leslie
